summary: Multidisciplinary team involvement at a single center enhances coordinated care for patients with colorectal cancer and hepatic metastases by ensuring consistent diagnosis, timely intervention, and integrated therapy planning. This centralized approach improves patient outcomes through standardized decisions and seamless communication among specialists involved in complex cases.
